Name: WEAPON_PARAM
Description: Defines core weapon properties including requirements, scaling modifiers, damage multipliers, animation categories, stamina costs, and interaction behavior such as parry, grab, and hit detection.

Fields.Name: Weapon ID
Fields.Description: Unique identifier for the weapon.

Fields.Name: Weapon Model ID
Fields.Description: References the 3D model used for the weapon.

Fields.Name: Upgrade Data ID
Fields.Description: Links to reinforcement/upgrade scaling configuration.

Fields.Name: Weapon Action Category ID
Fields.Description: Defines the set of attack animations used by this weapon.

Fields.Name: Weapon Type
Fields.Description: Defines the weapon class/type (e.g., sword, spear, etc.).

Fields.Name: Is Auto Homing Attack
Fields.Description: Enables automatic target tracking during attacks.

Fields.Name: Weapon Category
Fields.Description: Broad classification of weapon family.

Fields.Name: Cloth Collision ID
Fields.Description: References cloth simulation collision data.

Fields.Name: Required Strength
Fields.Description: Minimum strength required to use the weapon.

Fields.Name: Required Dexterity
Fields.Description: Minimum dexterity required to use the weapon.

Fields.Name: Required Intelligence
Fields.Description: Minimum intelligence required to use the weapon.

Fields.Name: Required Faith
Fields.Description: Minimum faith required to use the weapon.

Fields.Name: Weight (kg)
Fields.Description: Physical weight of the weapon affecting equip load.

Fields.Name: Adjusted Weight
Fields.Description: Weight adjustment used for balancing calculations.

Fields.Name: Durability
Fields.Description: Weapon durability before breaking.

Fields.Name: Repair Cost (Souls)
Fields.Description: Cost required to repair the weapon.

Fields.Name: Material ID
Fields.Description: Defines the weapon's material type.

Fields.Name: Melee Stamina Cost (Base)
Fields.Description: Base stamina consumption for melee attacks.

Fields.Name: Ranged Stamina Cost (Base)
Fields.Description: Base stamina consumption for ranged attacks.

Fields.Name: Stamina Cost Category ID
Fields.Description: Defines scaling category for stamina usage.

Fields.Name: Lock-On Distance Scale
Fields.Description: Adjusts effective attack range when locked onto a target.

Fields.Name: Grab Motion Rate
Fields.Description: Animation speed multiplier for grab attacks.

Fields.Name: Grab Rotation Speed [deg/s]
Fields.Description: Angular acceleration during grab attacks.

Fields.Name: Max Grab Rotation Speed [deg/s]
Fields.Description: Maximum rotational speed during grab attacks.

Fields.Name: Backstab Damage ID (Small)
Fields.Description: Damage configuration for small-scale backstab grabs.

Fields.Name: Backstab Damage ID (Medium)
Fields.Description: Damage configuration for medium-scale backstab grabs.

Fields.Name: Backstab Damage ID (Large)
Fields.Description: Damage configuration for large-scale backstab grabs.

Fields.Name: Guard Break Stab Damage ID (Small)
Fields.Description: Damage for small guard-break grab attacks.

Fields.Name: Guard Break Stab Damage ID (Medium)
Fields.Description: Damage for medium guard-break grab attacks.

Fields.Name: Guard Break Stab Damage ID (Large)
Fields.Description: Damage for large guard-break grab attacks.

Fields.Name: Parry Stab Damage ID (Small)
Fields.Description: Damage for small parry counter grabs.

Fields.Name: Parry Stab Damage ID (Medium)
Fields.Description: Damage for medium parry counter grabs.

Fields.Name: Parry Stab Damage ID (Large)
Fields.Description: Damage for large parry counter grabs.

Fields.Name: Parry Window Rate
Fields.Description: Active duration ratio during which parry is effective.

Fields.Name: Broken Weapon SFX ID
Fields.Description: Sound effect played when weapon breaks.

Fields.Name: Broken Weapon Sound Type
Fields.Description: Category of sound played when weapon breaks.

Fields.Name: Damage Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to all weapon damage.

Fields.Name: Stamina Damage Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier for stamina depletion inflicted.

Fields.Name: Durability Damage Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier for durability loss per hit.

Fields.Name: Poise Ignore Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting ability to bypass enemy poise.

Fields.Name: Damage Cut Ignore Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting shield/defense bypass.

Fields.Name: Stun Damage Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier for stun buildup.

Fields.Name: Hit Radius Scale
Fields.Description: Adjusts hit detection radius.

Fields.Name: Hit Length Scale
Fields.Description: Adjusts hit detection length.

Fields.Name: Recoil Hit Radius Scale
Fields.Description: Hit radius for recoil interactions.

Fields.Name: Recoil Hit Length Scale
Fields.Description: Hit length for recoil interactions.

Fields.Name: Menu Attack Category 1
Fields.Description: Primary attack attribute shown in UI.

Fields.Name: Menu Attack Category 2
Fields.Description: Secondary attack attribute shown in UI.

Fields.Name: Menu Poise Damage
Fields.Description: Displayed poise damage value in UI.

Fields.Name: Menu Counter Scaling
Fields.Description: Displayed counter-attack scaling value.

Fields.Name: Menu Spell Cast Speed
Fields.Description: Displayed spell casting speed modifier.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Scale (Player)
Fields.Description: Adjusts poise damage against players.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Scale (Enemy)
Fields.Description: Adjusts poise damage against enemies.

Fields.Name: Uninterruptible Rate
Fields.Description: Determines how often attacks cannot be interrupted by poise damage.
